title: Walking Trees!
description: Adds a walking tree boss fight to your game
body:
A mod that adds a walking tree boss fight to your game. If you like boss fights, this mod is for you! The walking tree spawns in snowy biomes and normal taiga biomes. If you see it, approach with caution.

Features:

-Walking tree with a jump attack and a minion attack.

-Walking sapling, the minion of the tree.
